description: Mirror, sighed. Two card-endpoints, both equal nodes, both must be reachable from the other side. The connection is designer-coordinated rather than incidental — the Galarian form's lore is *defined by its contrast against the Kanto original*. The art register reinforces this on both ends: Kanto in pastoral impressionistic painterly countryside, Galar in mountain action with the leek already raised as weapon. Both bullets cross-link [[galarian-regional-forms]] so a reader landing on either card sees the cohort node as the third anchor. NOT adding Kanto Farfetch'd to that node's appears_on — the Kanto form is the predecessor, not a cohort member; cohort membership predicates on the Galarian prefix per the node's own caveats. Worth the mirror.
citations: [Bulbapedia: Farfetch'd / Galarian Farfetch'd species pages, via WebSearch]
[PokeJungle: Galarian Farfetch'd and Sirfetch'd — Origin of Species, via WebSearch]
